inputs.label: Winning Probability (p)
inputs.businessContext: Probability that the bet wins (between 0 and 1).

inputs.label: Net Odds (b)
inputs.businessContext: Net odds received per unit bet; if you bet 1 and win, you get back your stake plus b (i.e., total return = 1 + b).

inputs.label: Kelly Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier on the full Kelly bet size (1 = full Kelly, 0.5 = half Kelly, etc.).

formulas.expected_growth: p * Math.log(1 + b * (fraction * (b * p - (1 - p)) / b)) + (1 - p) * Math.log(1 - (fraction * (b * p - (1 - p)) / b))
